asymmetry_arm.trend: MONOTONIC INCREASE: E scales linearly with asymmetry from ~10 to ~20
asymmetry_arm.coherence_sensitivity: NONE — Coh flat at 0.72-0.75 across all asymmetry values
asymmetry_arm.comparison_to_harmonic: SAME DIRECTION. Harmonic: E goes from 69 (asym=-1) to 75-89 (asym=0) to 80-95 (asym=+1). Holography: E goes from 10.6 to 15 to 20.2. Both monotone increasing. Holography energy scale is ~5x lower.

rotation_arm.trend: FLAT — rotation has zero measurable effect on holography
rotation_arm.comparison_to_harmonic: Same as harmonic where rotation was also noise-dominated at N=5

frequency_arm.trend: FLAT — frequency does not affect holography (confirmed Phase I.b finding)

categorization.reasoning: Holography is NOT degenerate — asymmetry moves its attractor monotonically just like in harmonic. NOT narrowly-bistable — no second attractor emerged under any parameter setting. NOT multi-stable — always single basin. It IS the same dynamical family as harmonic at a different operating point. The --task parameter shifts the entire energy scale (harmonic: E~75-89, holography: E~15). Asymmetry deforms both in the same direction.
categorization.key_evidence: Holography E scales linearly from 10.6 (asym=-1) to 20.2 (asym=+1) with slope ~4.8 E/asym-unit. Harmonic E shifts from 69 (asym=-1) through 75-89 bistability (asym=0) to 80-95 (asym=+1). Same direction, different scale.
categorization.implications: The 380-vertex graph supports ONE dynamical family, not two separate objects. The --task parameter is an operating-point selector, not a mode switch. Holography's lower energy scale prevents the bistability visible in harmonic — it may lack the energy headroom for a second basin.

pre_registration_evaluation.degenerate: KILLED — asymmetry clearly moves the attractor
pre_registration_evaluation.narrowly_bistable: KILLED — no second basin found at any setting (0/45 episodes)
pre_registration_evaluation.task_parameterized_same_family: CONFIRMED — monotone asymmetry response matches harmonic direction

all_15_runs_in_RETRY.note: Not all in RETRY — asym=-1 gave E<12, asym=+1 gave E>20. But all single-basin.

asym_matches_harmonic_pattern.note: Linear E-vs-asym in same direction as harmonic
